# Mark

A component for rendering highlighted/marked text. Renders a `<mark>` HTML element, commonly used to denote text that has been highlighted for reference purposes.

## Import

```jsx
import { Mark } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` | - | The text content to highlight |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

All standard Chakra UI style props are also supported.

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Text>
  The meeting is scheduled for <Mark>next Tuesday</Mark>.
</Text>
```

### With custom styling

```jsx
<Mark bg="green.100" color="green.800" px="1" rounded="sm">
  Approved
</Mark>
```

### In search results

```jsx
<Text>
  Results containing <Mark>search term</Mark> are shown below.
</Text>
```

## Features

- Renders a semantic `<mark>` HTML element
- Provides visual highlighting of text with a default background color
- Supports all Chakra UI style props for custom highlight styling
- Forwards refs to the underlying DOM element
- Lightweight wrapper with no additional overhead
